---
dataset-title: "Kansas Board of Regents"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../project_dataset_style.css">

<div class="dataset-container">
    <!-- Header Section -->
    <header class="dataset-header">
        <p class="header-tagline">Project Dataset</p>
        <h2 class="header-title"> {{< meta dataset-title >}}</h2>
        <div class="header-buttons">  
            <!-- Update the link for downloading the data -->
            <a href="https://osf.io/download/75ycf/?direct" class="btn btn-download" download="Data for KDSC Repository.zip">
              <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-zip-fill icon"></i> Download Full Dataset (.zip)
            </a>
            
            <!-- Update the reference link to the project description -->
            <a href="../projects/project_KBOR.html" class="btn btn-project">
                <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill icon"></i> View Project Page
            </a>
            
            <!-- Update the reference link to the class project -->
            <a href="../classplan/class_KBOR.html" class="btn btn-classplan">
                <i class="bi bi-book-half icon"></i> View the Class Plan
            </a> 
            
        </div>
    </header>
</div>
```

::: content-card
## About the Data
:::
